name: IdsEdwPMbrPrmcySnapshotExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT T.MBR_SK AS MBR_SK, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.RunDate}' AS date) AS ACTVTY_DT, SUBSTRING('@{pipeline().parameters.RunDate}',1,4)+SUBSTRING('@{pipeline().parameters.RunDate}',6,2) AS ACTVTY_YR_MO, T.CAE_UNIQ_KEY AS CAE_UNIQ_KEY, T.INDV_BE_KEY AS INDV_BE_KEY, T.PRI_IN AS PRI_IN, T.GRP_SK AS GRP_SK, T.MBR_BRTH_DT AS MBR_BRTH_DT, T.MBR_GNDR_CD AS MBR_GNDR_CD, T.LAST_UPDT_DT AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_CAE_MBR_PRMCY T) SELECT * FROM cte
